# Vendor Settings

## Overview
Pengaturan akun dan preferensi vendor.

## File Location
- `src/pages/vendor/Settings.tsx` - Halaman settings
- `src/pages/vendor/Profile.tsx` - Profile
- `src/components/vendor/VerificationUpload.tsx` - Verification

## Database Tables
- `vendors` - Data vendor
- `profiles` - Profile
- `vendor_verifications` - Dokumen verifikasi
- `vendor_bank_accounts` - Bank accounts

## Features
- ✅ Edit profile
- ✅ Change password
- ✅ Upload verification documents
- ✅ Bank account setup
- ✅ Notification preferences
- ✅ Service areas

## Implementation Status
| Feature | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Profile | ✅ Complete |
| Password | ✅ Complete |
| Verification | ✅ Complete |
| Bank | ✅ Complete |
| Notifications | ✅ Complete |

## Related Components
- `VerificationUpload`
- Bank account management
